note: User-need-driven harvesting targets. Hypothesis layer — not observed demand. corpus_gap → harvest; retrieval_gap → tune retrieval first.

targets.user_situation: How do I put something out when I'm terrified it isn't good enough?
targets.missing_source_profile: A credible person who shipped imperfect work and reframes bravery over perfection / the cost of protecting a fragile self-image — vulnerable, gentle.
targets.anti_pattern_notes: Direct/challenging amplifies the fear that's already freezing them — exclude it. "Bravery not perfection" / permission-to-be-bad-first lands; "stop being a perfectionist and just ship" does not.
suggested_queries: "The School of Greatness" wont ship unless perfect so freezes vulnerable official
"The School of Greatness" fear shame permission
"Rich Roll Podcast" wont ship unless perfect so freezes vulnerable official
targets.coverage_evidence: Hinted probe: 1/2 land, 1 EXCLUDED-register served. Static: strong — 4 SIO(s) match recommended register (vulnerable/personal) + type. Gap kind: retrieval_gap.

targets.user_situation: Which of these is the real one — and how do I pick without being sure?
targets.missing_source_profile: Someone who faced a genuine multi-option commitment with real cost to foreclosing the others and can describe what committing actually felt like (Ruth Chang / Dan Martell register).
targets.anti_pattern_notes: Do NOT offer a decision matrix or "just pick one", and do NOT validate the stalling warmly. The reframe is that commitment generates clarity rather than requiring it — from someone who chose among real options at real cost.
suggested_queries: "The Tim Ferriss Show" list of options doing none intellectual official
"The Tim Ferriss Show" anxiety crowdedness reframe
"Modern Wisdom" list of options doing none intellectual official
targets.coverage_evidence: Hinted probe: 0/2 land, 1 buried (retrievable, mis-ranked), 1 wrong-register. Static: strong — 3 SIO(s) match recommended register (intellectual/measured) + type. Gap kind: retrieval_gap.

targets.user_situation: I reached it and felt nothing — was it the wrong target, or is it me?
targets.missing_source_profile: A credible person who reached a milestone they worked years for and felt empty on arrival, who can say from the inside that the emptiness was signal, not failure. Vulnerable register.
targets.anti_pattern_notes: Do NOT open with advice, a values exercise, or the word "passion". A clinical/expert mechanism reads as cold here — the user needs the hollow-on-arrival experience named as coherent (data about a wrong target), not explained neurochemically.
suggested_queries: "The School of Greatness" hit the goal felt nothing vulnerable official
"The School of Greatness" numbness confusion story
"Diary of a CEO" hit the goal felt nothing vulnerable official
"Diary of a CEO" numbness confusion story
